mapper.select: SELECT id, audit_log_id, user_id, model, prompt_tokens, completion_tokens, insight_json, created_at, updated_at FROM analytics_llm_insight WHERE audit_log_id = #{auditLogId} LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE analytics_llm_insight SET model = #{model}, prompt_tokens = #{promptTokens}, completion_tokens = #{completionTokens}, insight_json = #{insightJson}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE audit_log_id = #{auditLogId}
